meaning: n.步行者adj.徒步的,呆板的,通俗的
examples: I traversed the narrow pedestrian bridge.
A pedestrian bridge now connects the parking garage with the mall.
From the museum's third-floor sculpture terrace, a silvery pedestrian bridge arches over to Millennium Park.
This movement to legislate distracted walking has a purpose: Pedestrian fatalities are on the rise.
